title: A Genius With Amnesia - Victor Savkin, Nx
summary: Victor Savkin argues that current coding agents fail because they operate with severe context limitations and memory loss between interactions, analogous to an expert engineer who can only see a tiny portion of code at a time. He advocates for solutions like Nx and Polygraph to enable agents with better workspace awareness and continuity.
writeup: Victor Savkin of Nx makes the case that today's coding agents underperform because they work under severe context limits and lose memory between interactions, comparable to an expert engineer who can see only a small fraction of the codebase at any moment. The talk frames the problem as one of workspace awareness and continuity rather than raw model capability. Savkin points to Nx and Polygraph as approaches for giving agents broader visibility into a monorepo and persistent context across interactions.
